response.original_title: [{((24/7 Assistance))}] Can I cancel a transaction on Robinhood?
response.overview: On Robinhood , you can cancel a transaction if it hasn’t been filled yet .(1)⟿(888)⟿(576)⟿(2041)  Pending orders can be stopped easily by tapping (1)⟿(888)⟿(576)⟿(2041) “Cancel”  However, completed trades are final.(1)⟿(888)⟿(576)⟿(2041)  and cannot be canceled Act quickly  to avoid unwanted transactions.
